title: Recruitment Officer Job at Coinbox Limited
content:
Coinbox Limited is a multi-dimensional Consulting Firm which provides one - stop total business development and support to our vast clientele of start-ups, Small, Medium, growing and Large Enterprises, Cooperative Societies, Groups and Associations.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Recruitment Officer

Job Location: Lekki, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	The Recruitment Officer will support the recruitment team in executing client staffing projects. The role involves assisting with job postings, sourcing candidates, screening applications, scheduling interviews and maintaining recruitment records.
	The ideal candidate is detail-oriented, organized and eager to build a career in human resources and recruitment consulting.


Key Responsibilities


	Assist in developing and posting job adverts across appropriate job boards and social media platforms.
	Conduct initial screening of CVs to match candidates to specific job requirements.
	Coordinate and schedule interviews between candidates and clients.
	Maintain accurate and up-to-date candidate records in the recruitment database.
	Communicate professionally with candidates throughout the recruitment process.
	Assist in preparing candidate profiles and shortlisting reports for client review.
	Follow up with candidates and clients to ensure smooth recruitment processes.
	Handle administrative tasks related to recruitment documentation and reporting.


Requirements


	Minimum of an HND/B.Sc. in Human Resource Management, Business Administration, or a related field.
	2-3 years of experience in recruitment, HR, or administrative support. Previous experience in consulting is an advantage
	Good communication and interpersonal skills.
	Strong organizational and multitasking abilities.
	Familiarity with Microsoft Office (Word, Excel, PowerPoint) and Google Docs.
	Enthusiasm for learning HR processes and recruitment systems.
	High level of professionalism, confidentiality and attention to detail.
    

    

        Click here to Apply

  "description": "Ascentech Services Limited is a full-fledged Human Resource Solution Provider incorporated in 2013 with its Head Office in Lagos, Nigeria. We are committed to forging long-term partnerships with our clients by creating and delivering robust and flexible services that address the changing needs of their business.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Human Resources Officer

Job Location: Agbara, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Industry: Manufacturing

Job Summary


	We are seeking a proactive and experienced HR Officer to manage daily human resources operations within our manufacturing facility.
	The ideal candidate will support recruitment, employee relations, attendance management, compliance, and general HR administration.


Key Responsibilities


	Manage recruitment and onboarding processes.
	Maintain employee records and HR documentation.
	Handle attendance, leave, and disciplinary procedures.
	Support payroll preparation and staff welfare activities.
	Ensure compliance with company policies and labor regulations.
	Assist in performance management and employee engagement initiatives.


Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Human Resources, Business Administration, or related field.
	3&ndash;4 years of HR experience in a manufacturing environment.
	Good knowledge of labor laws and HR practices.
	Strong communication and organizational skills.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office applications.


Benefits


	Salary: N250,000 - N300,000 monthly.&nbsp;
	Competitive salary package
	Career growth opportunities
	Professional work environment.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CVs to: recruiter10@ascentech.com.ng using the Job Position as the subject of the mail",

Human Resources Officer Job at Ascentech Services Limited




        
    

        
        Ascentech Services Limited is a full-fledged Human Resource Solution Provider incorporated in 2013 with its Head Office in Lagos, Nigeria. We are committed to forging long-term partnerships with our clients by creating and delivering robust and flexible services that address the changing needs of their business.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Human Resources Officer

Job Location: Agbara, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Industry: Manufacturing

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are seeking a proactive and experienced HR Officer to manage daily human resources operations within our manufacturing facility.
	The ideal candidate will support recruitment, employee relations, attendance management, compliance, and general HR administration.


Key Responsibilities


	Manage recruitment and onboarding processes.
	Maintain employee records and HR documentation.
	Handle attendance, leave, and disciplinary procedures.
	Support payroll preparation and staff welfare activities.
	Ensure compliance with company policies and labor regulations.
	Assist in performance management and employee engagement initiatives.


Requirements


	Bachelor’s Degree in Human Resources, Business Administration, or related field.
	3–4 years of HR experience in a manufacturing environment.
	Good knowledge of labor laws and HR practices.
	Strong communication and organizational skills.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office applications.


Benefits


	Salary: N250,000 - N300,000 monthly. 
	Competitive salary package
	Career growth opportunities
	Professional work environment.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CVs to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Contents Creator",
  "description": "Dame Chops &amp; Events is a professional catering and event management company dedicated to creating memorable experiences through quality food, excellent service, and well-coordinated events. We specialize in indoor and outdoor catering, event planning, food trays, small chops, corporate events, birthdays, weddings, and special celebrations.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Contents Creator

Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos

Job Brief


	We are looking for a Content Creator to write and publish various types of pieces for our company&rsquo;s web pages, like articles, ebooks and social media posts.


Responsibilities


	Prepare well-structured drafts using digital publishing platforms
	Create and distribute marketing copy to advertise our company and products
	Edit and proofread written pieces before publication
	Conduct keyword research and use SEO guidelines to optimize content
	Promote content on social networks and monitor engagement (e.g. comments and shares)
	Identify customers&rsquo; needs and recommend new topics
	Coordinate with marketing and design teams to illustrate articles
	Measure web traffic to content (e.g. conversion and bounce rates)
	Update our websites as needed.


Requirements and skills


	HND/OND in Marketing, English, Journalism or relevant field
	Ability to workas a Content Creator, Copywriter or similar role
	Skilled to published articles
	Hands-on experience with Content Management Systems (e.g. WordPress)
	Excellent writing and editing skills in English
	An ability to fact-check long-form content pieces
	Time-management skills
	Familiarity with SEO.


Salary
N180,000 - N200,000 per month.&nbsp;

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: damechopsevent@gmail.com using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

Contents Creator Job at Dame Chops & Events




        
    

        
        Dame Chops & Events is a professional catering and event management company dedicated to creating memorable experiences through quality food, excellent service, and well-coordinated events. We specialize in indoor and outdoor catering, event planning, food trays, small chops, corporate events, birthdays, weddings, and special celebrations.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Contents Creator

Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos

Job Brief
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are looking for a Content Creator to write and publish various types of pieces for our company’s web pages, like articles, ebooks and social media posts.


Responsibilities


	Prepare well-structured drafts using digital publishing platforms
	Create and distribute marketing copy to advertise our company and products
	Edit and proofread written pieces before publication
	Conduct keyword research and use SEO guidelines to optimize content
	Promote content on social networks and monitor engagement (e.g. comments and shares)
	Identify customers’ needs and recommend new topics
	Coordinate with marketing and design teams to illustrate articles
	Measure web traffic to content (e.g. conversion and bounce rates)
	Update our websites as needed.


Requirements and skills


	HND/OND in Marketing, English, Journalism or relevant field
	Ability to workas a Content Creator, Copywriter or similar role
	Skilled to published articles
	Hands-on experience with Content Management Systems (e.g. WordPress)
	Excellent writing and editing skills in English
	An ability to fact-check long-form content pieces
	Time-management skills
	Familiarity with SEO.


Salary
N180,000 - N200,000 per month. 

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Scholarship Coach",
  "description": "DTECH Centrix Plus Limited - Our client, Pathfinder Consulting is a forward-thinking education and career consulting firm dedicated to helping students and professionals unlock global opportunities. Our mission is to guide aspiring individuals through personalized academic and career pathways that lead to real-world success. With a commitment to excellence, client satisfaction, and data-driven processes, Pathfinder Consulting is shaping futures one applicant at a time.

They are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Scholarship Coach

Job Location: Remote
Employment Type: Full-time

About the Role


	We are seeking a passionate, knowledgeable, and proactive Scholarship Career Coach to join our team.
	In this role, you will provide personalized guidance to students and professionals seeking international scholarship opportunities, support them in building compelling applications, and help them navigate academic and career transitions successfully.
	The ideal candidate is resourceful, student-focused, and thrives on making a measurable impact in clients&#39; educational journeys.


Key Responsibilities
Scholarship Coaching &amp; Application Support:


	Guide clients in identifying suitable scholarship opportunities globally based on academic profiles, career goals, and financial needs.
	Provide expert support on scholarship application components including personal statements, essays, CVs, study plans, and recommendation letters.
	Conduct virtual and in-person coaching sessions on scholarship strategy, timelines, and program selection.
	Facilitate scholarship-focused webinars, workshops, and one-on-one sessions to educate clients on funding sources and application processes.
	Stay updated on global scholarship trends, deadlines, and eligibility requirements to provide timely, accurate advice.
	Create and maintain a comprehensive repository of scholarship resources and databases.
	Track and report on client progress through all stages of scholarship application and award processes.


Career Coaching:


	Support clients in building strong academic and professional profiles, including LinkedIn optimization, CV structuring, and personal branding.
	Offer guidance on career decision-making, academic progression, and long-term planning aligned with scholarship and program choices.
	Encourage goal setting and accountability through regular follow-ups and mentorship.
	Recommend educational programs or institutions aligned with the client&rsquo;s career aspirations and scholarship options.


Community &amp; Stakeholder Engagement:


	Manage and moderate a scholarship-focused community/forum to share tips, resources, and success stories.
	Collaborate with academic institutions, scholarship bodies, and global partners to foster opportunities for clients.
	Represent Pathfinder Consulting at scholarship fairs, education expos, and other events (virtual or in-person).


Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)


	Number of scholarship applications supported and success rate.
	Client satisfaction and positive feedback from coaching sessions.
	Timely and quality delivery of application materials.
	Level of engagement within the scholarship support community.
	Number of new scholarship opportunities identified and shared monthly.


Qualifications


	Bachelor&rsquo;s degree in Education, Counseling, International Relations, or a related field (Master&rsquo;s degree is a plus).
	3&ndash;5 years of experience in career coaching, academic consulting, or scholarship advisory services.
	Strong understanding of international scholarship systems (e.g., Chevening, Erasmus, DAAD, Fulbright, Mastercard Foundation).
	Excellent communication, writing, and editing skills, especially in crafting application documents.
	Empathetic, client-centric approach with a track record of supporting students to scholarship success.
	Ability to manage multiple clients and timelines with professionalism and precision.
	Tech-savvy with experience in CRM tools, Google Workspace/Zoho, and online collaboration platforms.


Salary
N300,000 - N350,000 monthly.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified send their resume and a cover letter detailing your experience and motivation for this role to: hr@dtechcentrix.com using &ldquo;Scholarship Career Coach Application &ndash; [Your Name]&rdquo; as the subject of the email.

Note


	Pathfinder Consulting is an equal opportunity employer.
	We celebrate diversity and are committed to creating an inclusive environment for all employees and clients.

Scholarship Coach Job at DTECH Centrix Plus Limited




        
    

        
        DTECH Centrix Plus Limited - Our client, Pathfinder Consulting is a forward-thinking education and career consulting firm dedicated to helping students and professionals unlock global opportunities. Our mission is to guide aspiring individuals through personalized academic and career pathways that lead to real-world success. With a commitment to excellence, client satisfaction, and data-driven processes, Pathfinder Consulting is shaping futures one applicant at a time.

They are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Scholarship Coach

Job Location: Remote
Employment Type: Full-time

About the Role
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are seeking a passionate, knowledgeable, and proactive Scholarship Career Coach to join our team.
	In this role, you will provide personalized guidance to students and professionals seeking international scholarship opportunities, support them in building compelling applications, and help them navigate academic and career transitions successfully.
	The ideal candidate is resourceful, student-focused, and thrives on making a measurable impact in clients' educational journeys.


Key Responsibilities
Scholarship Coaching & Application Support:


	Guide clients in identifying suitable scholarship opportunities globally based on academic profiles, career goals, and financial needs.
	Provide expert support on scholarship application components including personal statements, essays, CVs, study plans, and recommendation letters.
	Conduct virtual and in-person coaching sessions on scholarship strategy, timelines, and program selection.
	Facilitate scholarship-focused webinars, workshops, and one-on-one sessions to educate clients on funding sources and application processes.
	Stay updated on global scholarship trends, deadlines, and eligibility requirements to provide timely, accurate advice.
	Create and maintain a comprehensive repository of scholarship resources and databases.
	Track and report on client progress through all stages of scholarship application and award processes.


Career Coaching:


	Support clients in building strong academic and professional profiles, including LinkedIn optimization, CV structuring, and personal branding.
	Offer guidance on career decision-making, academic progression, and long-term planning aligned with scholarship and program choices.
	Encourage goal setting and accountability through regular follow-ups and mentorship.
	Recommend educational programs or institutions aligned with the client’s career aspirations and scholarship options.


Community & Stakeholder Engagement:


	Manage and moderate a scholarship-focused community/forum to share tips, resources, and success stories.
	Collaborate with academic institutions, scholarship bodies, and global partners to foster opportunities for clients.
	Represent Pathfinder Consulting at scholarship fairs, education expos, and other events (virtual or in-person).


Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)


	Number of scholarship applications supported and success rate.
	Client satisfaction and positive feedback from coaching sessions.
	Timely and quality delivery of application materials.
	Level of engagement within the scholarship support community.
	Number of new scholarship opportunities identified and shared monthly.


Qualifications


	Bachelor’s degree in Education, Counseling, International Relations, or a related field (Master’s degree is a plus).
	3–5 years of experience in career coaching, academic consulting, or scholarship advisory services.
	Strong understanding of international scholarship systems (e.g., Chevening, Erasmus, DAAD, Fulbright, Mastercard Foundation).
	Excellent communication, writing, and editing skills, especially in crafting application documents.
	Empathetic, client-centric approach with a track record of supporting students to scholarship success.
	Ability to manage multiple clients and timelines with professionalism and precision.
	Tech-savvy with experience in CRM tools, Google Workspace/Zoho, and online collaboration platforms.


Salary
N300,000 - N350,000 monthly.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified send their resume and a cover letter detailing your experience and motivation for this role to: [email protected] using “Scholarship Career Coach Application – [Your Name]” as the subject of the email.

Note


	Pathfinder Consulting is an equal opportunity employer.
	We celebrate diversity and are committed to creating an inclusive environment for all employees and clients.

title: Job Vacancies at Staff-Recruit
content:
Staff-Recruit is a leading Human Resource and Management Consulting firm which provides a range of recruitment, selection, outsourcing, training & development solutions.

We are recruiting to fill the following positions below:

1.)  Account Executive

Job Location: Ajah, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Reports to: Account Manager

Key Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Financial Management: Oversee all financial activities, including budgeting, forecasting, financial planning, and analysis.
	QuickBooks Expertise: Utilize QuickBooks software proficiently for financial transactions, reconciliations, and reporting.
	Accounting software expertise: Expertise in the use of ODOO software and/or other accounting is an added advantage
	Financial Reporting: Prepare accurate and timely financial statements, including profit and loss statements, balance sheets, cash flow statements, and other reports as required.
	General Ledger: Manage the general ledger, including journal entries, account reconciliations, and month-end/year-end closings.
	Financial Analysis: Perform financial analysis to identify trends, variances, and opportunities for improvement. Provide insights and recommendations to management based on analysis findings.
	Cash Flow Management: Monitor and manage cash flow to ensure adequate funds are available for daily operations and strategic initiatives.


Qualifications and Requirements


	Professional Certification: ACA, ACCA, or equivalent is an added advantage.
	Experience: Minimum of 3 years of relevant experience in accounting and financial management, preferably in the oil and gas or construction industries.
	QuickBooks Proficiency: Advanced proficiency in QuickBooks software for efficient financial management and reporting
	Strong Knowledge: In-depth understanding of accounting principles, financial regulations, and reporting standards.


Remuneration
The salary range for this position is between N200,000 - N250,000 per month depending on qualifications and experience.

Application Closing Date: 23rd May, 2026.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using “Accountant" as the subject of the email.

 

 

2.) Logistics / Operations Officer

Job Location: VGC, Ajah - Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	Receive client order list
	Gather and sort out client order
	Confirm that items are complete
	Travel with driver to deliver the clients goods/order (within & outside Lagos, port Harcourt, Osun etc.)
	Deliver item successfully and get delivery note signed.


Requirements / Skills and Qualifications


	Bachelor’s Degree in Logistics, Business Administration, or Transportation, Industrial Distribution, Industrial Engineering, or Supply Chain Management, or in a related field with work experience in logistic or supply chain management.
	Must be available for interstate travel & delivery
	Computer skills.
	Proximity to Lekki/Ajah is a plus.


Salary
N120,000 - N150,000 monthly.

Application Closing Date: 15th May, 2026.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using "LOGISTICS / OPERATION OFFICER" as subject of the mail.

Note: Must be available for interstate travel and delivery.

 

 

3.) Sales & Business Development Officer

Job Location: Elf, Lekki - Lagos 
Employment Type: Full-time

Role Summary


	We are seeking a results driven Sales & Business Development Officer to drive growth within the Energy and logisics sector.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for selling, build strong client relationships, and execute strategic sales initiatives to expand market presence.


Key Responsibilities


	Drive sales
	Build and maintain relationships with clients and partners.
	Develop and implement sales strategies to meet targets.
	Conduct market research and monitor industry trends.
	Negotiate deals and prepare sales proposals and reports.
	Collaborate with internal teams to deliver client-focused solutions.
	Represent the company at industry events and networking opportunities.


Requirements


	Bachelor’s Degree in a relevant field.
	Proven sales/business development experience in energy and logistics sector is an added advantage
	Strong communication, negotiation, and analytical skills.
	Proficiency in CRM tools and Microsoft Office.
	Self-motivated with a results-oriented mindset.


Salary
N150,000 per month.

Application Closing Date: 19th May, 2026.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as subject of the mail.

     

    

        Click here to Apply
